ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "leave_balance" INTEGER /* Total leave balance available for the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated, on leave) */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting the leave */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the leave request (e.g., Approved, Denied, Pending) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was submitted */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave type associated with the request */,
  "manager_comment" TEXT /* Comments from the manager regarding the leave request */,
  "hr_comment" TEXT /* Comments from HR regarding the leave request */,
  "pay_deduction" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is any pay deduction associated with the leave request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type (e.g., Vacation, Sick Leave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave type */,
  "max_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days allowed for the leave type */,
  "carry_over" INTEGER /* Indicates if unused leave days can be carried over to the next year */,
  "notice_period" INTEGER /* Minimum notice period required for the leave type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave balance entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose leave balance is tracked */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave type associated with the balance */,
  "total_allocated" INTEGER /* Total leave allocated to the employee for the leave type */,
  "used" INTEGER /* Total leave used by the employee for the leave type */,
  "remaining" INTEGER /* Remaining leave balance for the employee for the leave type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the leave balance is valid */,
  "carry_over_days" INTEGER /* Number of days carried over from the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave history record */,
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave request being monitored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request at the time of change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the status change */,
  "approval_level" TEXT /* Level of approval (e.g., manager, HR, director) */,
  "approval_comment" TEXT /* Comments made during the approval process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_histories_leave_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave request associated with the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submitted document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, JPG) */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_leave_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, HR Admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_workflows" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval workflow entry */,
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave request under the workflow */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approver (manager) responsible for approval */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the approval action was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval action (e.g., Approved, Denied) */,
  "next_approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the next approver in the workflow */,
  "approval_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the approval or denial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_workflows_leave_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave request associated with the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_leave_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave request associated with the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., Created, Updated, Deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_leave_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Employee, Manager, HR Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role responsibilities and permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the setting */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key of the setting (e.g., max_leave_days) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., 30) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
